title: Friends Mods for Server
description: A combination of mods for the server is designed to boost the performance and niceness of the world. Include Simple voice chat.
body:
# Friends Mods for Server

### A combination of mods for the server.

Is designed to boost the performance and niceness of the world. With a few custom world-gen mods (they don't add any new blocks so work with the vanilla game) and a few new structures to make the exploration better.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### This is a mod pack made for personal use with some friends of mine so it will be low quality uploading it here in case someone wants to use it and ease of excess for my friends.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Most important Mods.

- Lithium
- Simple voice chat (requires some extra setup, information can be found [her.](https://modrepo.de/minecraft/voicechat/wiki/server_setup)
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village
- Dungeons and Taverns + it's offspring (adds new structures that are fun to explore)
- Geyser (lats bedrock players play on the server require more setup [info here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/geyser))
- Nullscape (makes the end cool)
- True Ending: Ender Dragon Overhaul
- Tectonic (Massively altered world generation with mountain ranges, underground rivers and more!)

### It is made to work with Friends Client Mods. 
[Find it here.](https://modrinth.com/modpack/friends-client-mods)

---
